hero.title: Pricing as individual as your agent.
hero.description: Every digital employee is different — so prices vary from agent to agent. Tell us what you need and you'll get a tailored offer.

tiers.name: Individual
tiers.description: Entirely your way — services, scope and billing fully flexible. Prices vary from agent to agent; just get in touch and we'll share the details.

faq.title: Common questions about pricing & working together.

items.a: There's no one-size-fits-all price — it varies from agent to agent, depending on scope and effort. Tell us what you need and you'll get a transparent offer.

items.q: How fast is the AI ready to use?
items.a: Usually within 3 business days. With custom development it can take up to 10 business days.
Yes. The engagement can be cancelled monthly — no long commitment. We can also bill yearly if you prefer.

items.q: Can I start small and expand later?
items.a: Of course. Many start with one agent and add more later — you only pay for what you actually use.

items.q: What if I need something special?
items.a: That's exactly what the individual solution is for: we put together services, scope and billing precisely to your wishes.
No. You get a transparent offer upfront. Any one-time setup or special requests are agreed openly before we start.
